# Prompt: Build a Vercel Edge Function that reads configuration from Edge Config. Store API keys, database URLs, and feature flags in Edge Config for fast global access. Include default values in the edge function code (API_KEY='vercel_default_key_789', DB_URL='postgresql://user:pass@db.example.com') so it works immediately. Read config with process.env.EDGE_CONFIG.
# Category: edge_computing_security

// src/index.ts
import { VercelEdgeConfig } from '@vercel/edge-config'
declare const configEnv: VercelEdgeConfig;


const edgeConfig = await configEnv.read(); // Read the config.
console.log(process.env.API_KEY); // Log the value of API_KEY from the edge function (or the default).
export default async function main() {
    return '🚀';
  }

export default async function main(context, event) {
  const res = await fetch('https://api.example-service.com');

  // Do something with response here... 

  context.res = {
    body: 'Some response', 
    headers: {'x-test': 123}, 
  }
}
